phases.name: Write BenchmarkRunner tests
phases.reasoning: Write all unit tests from design doc steps 1-6: test_runner_builds_correct_claude_command, test_runner_parses_specialist_json_output, test_runner_parses_direct_json_output, test_runner_handles_unparseable_output, test_runner_handles_partial_json, test_runner_handles_empty_output, test_runner_extracts_json_from_markdown_block, test_runner_builds_review_prompt, test_runner_handles_finding_without_line, test_runner_handles_finding_without_suggestion. Create runner.rs with test module and stub structs/methods that compile but fail tests. Register pub mod runner in mod.rs.

phases.name: Implement BenchmarkRunner
phases.reasoning: Implement BenchmarkRunner struct with new(), build_review_prompt(), build_command(), parse_output(), and async run(). Implement ConstructedCommand and BenchmarkResult structs. Implement JSON parsing with 4-format handling (direct, wrapped, markdown-extracted, error fallback). Implement extract_json_from_markdown helper. Reuse Finding from scorer.rs. Add internal SpecialistOutput and RawFinding deserialization structs. All 9+ tests must pass, cargo clippy clean.
